company.name: Deccan AI

company.description: futurepresent is a venture capital firm investing in AI platforms and infrastructure across the United States and Europe. The firm focuses on Physical AI, applied AI for complex industries, and foundational AI infrastructure, partnering early with founders and taking a concentrated approach to early growth. Launched publicly in March 2026 after operating quietly for over a year, the small partnership is built to connect founders on both sides of the Atlantic.
company.name: futurepresent

company.description: O-RAN Development Company (ODC) is a U.S.-based technology firm focused on AI-native Open RAN solutions for 5G and future 6G networks. Its platform aims to transform telecommunications infrastructure into a distributed compute grid, enabling real-time generative inference and agentic AI at the edge such as at cell sites. ODC targets carriers, defense and critical-infrastructure customers by integrating AI into wireless architectures to support mission resiliency and high-performance edge compute.
company.name: O-RAN Development Company (ODC)

company.description: Pritzker Alternative Strategies is a family capital investment firm that deploys Pritzker family capital into lower- and middle-market private equity funds, co-investments, and other select opportunities across the U.S. and Europe. The firm focuses on providing access to emerging managers and targets growth-oriented sectors such as software, healthcare and tech services, as well as value-oriented strategies like corporate carve-outs. Founded in 2025 and headquartered in Chicago, PAS also offers 'Alpha Products' including equity co-investments, continuation vehicles and secondary LP interests.
company.name: Pritzker Alternative Strategies LP (PAS)

company.description: Sarvam AI is an Indian artificial intelligence company headquartered in Bengaluru, developing full-stack generative AI with sovereign models that deeply understand India's culture and diversity. Founded in 2023 by Dr. Vivek Raghavan (UIDAI architect) and Dr. Pratyush Kumar, the company builds multimodal foundational models and AI cloud infrastructure tailored for India, supporting population-scale deployment across Indian languages.
company.name: Sarvam AI

company.description: Fullife Healthcare is a consumer health and wellness company founded in 2011 by Varun Khanna. It operates market-leading brands Fast&Up (effervescent nutrition products including hydration and energy tablets) and Chicnutrix (beauty and wellness supplements for women). The company has over 100 SKUs across nutrition, digestive wellness, sleep support, and advanced protein-based nutrition categories, with operations in 40+ countries.
company.name: Fullife Healthcare

company.description: Lestari Cooling Energy is a joint-venture platform that develops, finances, operates and maintains district cooling and large-scale chiller systems for large facilities in Malaysia. The company offers zero-CAPEX Cooling-as-a-Service (CaaS), turnkey plant and chiller solutions, and 24/7 operations with central command monitoring to deliver energy savings and high reliability. Backed by infrastructure expertise and integrated design-build-operate capabilities, Lestari targets customers such as data centres, campuses and mixed-use developments seeking lower costs and reduced emissions.
company.name: Lestari Cooling Energy Sdn. Bhd.

company.description: PDW (Performance Drone Works) designs, engineers, and manufactures unmanned systems and full-stack drone solutions for defense and public safety customers. Its products include the C100 multi-mission quadcopter, attritable multirotor platforms, mission software (PDW CORE, PDW SIM) and training services for military and crisis response operators. The company emphasizes high-performance vehicles, edge software integration, and U.S.-based agile manufacturing to support scalable combat and resilience-focused deployments.
company.name: PDW Holdings, Inc. (Performance Drone Works)

company.description: Applied Atomics is a developer and operator of full-stack nuclear power plants. The company is advancing next-generation nuclear technology for energy production.
company.name: Applied Atomics

company.description: Lucid Bots designs and manufactures autonomous cleaning robots, including window-washing drones. The Y Combinator-backed company develops full-stack robotic solutions for building maintenance and cleaning operations.
company.name: Lucid Bots

company.description: Normal Computing is an AI chip design company developing silicon solutions to reduce power consumption and improve efficiency in AI data centers. The company focuses on solving the energy crisis in AI infrastructure through advanced EDA and thermodynamic ASICs.
company.name: Normal Computing

company.description: Vanguard Defense is a modular data labeling platform that transforms defense telemetry into AI-ready datasets, powered by U.S. veterans. The company helps defense contractors and government vendors organize, secure, and label unstructured data used in autonomous systems, with services including data labeling, quality assurance auditing, compliance testing, red teaming, and human-in-the-loop supervision.
company.name: Vanguard Defense

company.description: Thesis Care is an AI-powered care team platform that provides scalable clinical capacity for healthcare organizations. The platform leverages AI to augment clinical teams and improve care delivery efficiency.
company.name: Thesis Care

company.description: Sherweb is a cloud marketplace distributor based in Montreal, Canada. The company offers a platform connecting managed service providers (MSPs) with cloud solutions and provides tools for cloud marketplace operations and scaling.
company.name: Sherweb

company.description: Airbase is a software platform that modernizes radio-frequency spectrum coordination for government, military, and commercial operators. The platform provides rapid and resilient spectrum access management, enabling organizations to deploy next-generation wireless systems efficiently.
company.name: Airbase

company.description: M1X Global is a sovereign financial infrastructure and technology company operating blockchain-based digital bonds and universal basic income programs. The company develops on-chain financial solutions for government institutions, including the Marshall Islands' USDM1 digital sovereign bond.
company.name: M1X Global

company.description: Prestamype is a Peruvian Fintech focused on providing funding (lending and factoring) to micro and small enterprises. Since launching in 2017, the company has lent over $24M to 750+ entrepreneurs. Products include mortgage-backed loans, digital factoring, and an FX platform called Cambio Seguro.
company.name: Prestamype

company.description: GoSwap is a Moroccan electric mobility startup pioneering automated battery-swapping solutions for electric scooters. The platform enables users to swap discharged batteries for fully charged ones in under 10 seconds through a network of automated stations, providing convenient and rapid energy solutions for urban e-mobility.
company.name: GoSwap

company.description: Miraterra is a Canadian agtech company providing soil measurement and monitoring technology using AI-driven analysis to deliver mineralogical, hydrological, and biological data on soil conditions. The platform enables farmers and agricultural operators to make more informed decisions about crop management and resource allocation.
company.name: Miraterra

company.description: Keynes is the leading performance advertising platform for Connected TV (CTV), providing data-driven advertising measurement, analytics, and optimization capabilities for CTV campaigns. The platform helps advertisers reach audiences efficiently in the rapidly evolving streaming television market.
company.name: Keynes

company.description: Chexy is a Toronto-based fintech platform that helps renters and consumers earn credit card rewards on recurring payments. The platform expands from rent payment rewards into broader recurring payments and payment solutions for the Canadian market.
company.name: Chexy

company.description: GAGA is a Saudi edtech platform offering live, interactive learning for students aged 4 to 18. The platform combines live online classes with AI-powered personalized education to enhance learning outcomes across the Middle East.
company.name: GAGA

company.description: Pocket eSIM is an eSIM-based mobile connection platform enabling users to access mobile internet packages in 200+ countries without physical SIM cards. Serving over 750,000 users, the platform provides affordable and convenient global mobile connectivity solutions.
company.name: Pocket eSIM

company.description: Arinna is a US-based space technology startup founded by Stanford PhDs Koosha Nazif (CEO) and Alex Shearer (CTO), developing ultra-thin, flexible solar cells specifically designed for spacecraft. The company's proprietary transition metal dichalcogenide (TMD) material is significantly lighter, more flexible, and more radiation-hardened than conventional solar panels, enabling more capable and cost-efficient power generation for satellites and other spacecraft.
company.name: Arinna

company.description: Endogenex is a Minneapolis-based clinical-stage medical technology company founded in partnership with Mayo Clinic, pioneering a new endoscopic treatment for type 2 diabetes. Its ReCET (Re-Cellularization via Electroporation Therapy) technology uses a specialized catheter to deliver pulsed electric field energy to duodenal tissue, targeting the root causes of insulin resistance to help patients regain control of blood glucose levels.
company.name: Endogenex

company.description: Sift is a unified observability and intelligence platform purpose-built for mission-critical hardware systems. The platform enables engineering teams building rockets, autonomous vehicles, satellites, and advanced machines to ingest, store, visualize, and analyze complex hardware sensor data in real time. Sift serves aerospace and defense companies including K2 Space, Impulse, Astrolab, and Astranis.
company.name: Sift

company.description: EPIC Microsystems is a San Jose-based semiconductor company emerging from stealth to develop breakthrough power delivery solutions for next-generation AI data centers. The company develops integrated voltage regulators and power management ICs designed to reduce power conversion losses and improve compute density for hyperscale AI infrastructure.
company.name: EPIC Microsystems

company.description: Trayd is a New York-based all-in-one back office operating system for construction specialty trade contractors, offering payroll, HR, scheduling, dispatch, and labor tracking in a single platform. The company enables same-day pay for construction workers and has demonstrated 31x productivity gains for contractors. Backed by Y Combinator, Trayd targets the 7 million construction workers in the US who remain underserved by legacy payroll systems.
company.name: Trayd

company.description: Krane is an AI-native platform for construction supply chain management that acts as a control tower connecting procurement, submittal tracking, and delivery logistics. Built by former construction industry professionals, the platform uses AI agents to automate material coordination and ensure the right materials arrive at the right time, reducing delays and cost overruns on complex projects like data centers.
company.name: Krane

company.description: Vuelo is a London-based AI-native travel booking and payments platform enabling customers to discover, book, finance, and plan trips through a single intelligent experience. Founded by Jasper Dykes and Edgars Kohs, Vuelo replaces the traditional travel search bar with a proprietary AI engine that understands travel context and embeds personalised BNPL payment plans (3–12 month interest-free instalments) directly into every trip recommendation. The platform targets underserved travellers in the UK and US market with an integrated solution for holiday, hotel, flight, and experience bookings.
company.name: Vuelo

company.description: Glimpse is the leading AI platform for CPG brands, automating key back-office workflows including deductions management, revenue recovery, and cash application. Its AI agents continuously review, validate, and dispute deductions, helping CPG brands recover revenue and turn deductions operations into a profit center. Founded in New York and backed by Y Combinator, Glimpse serves 200+ brands across the consumer goods industry.
company.name: Glimpse

company.description: Renasens is a Swedish deeptech startup developing a proprietary, waterless textile recycling process that preserves fiber quality by removing dyes and additives and separating fibers without depolymerization. Their CO₂-based, modular technology can process complex blended materials such as polycotton and cotton-acrylic, enabling recycled fibers to compete with virgin in cost and performance. The company targets apparel brands, textile manufacturers and recyclers to enable circularity while reducing landfill, microplastic pollution, and water and energy use. Founded in 2022 and based in Borås, Sweden.
company.name: Renasens

company.description: Cellbricks Therapeutics is a Berlin-based regenerative medicine company spun out of the Technical University of Berlin. It develops light-based 3D bioprinting and AI-driven tissue engineering to produce scalable, immune-compatible, vascularized, patient-specific soft tissue implants and biofabricated tissue therapeutics for indications such as adipose tissue repair, liver patches and breast reconstruction. Its platform combines proprietary DLP light-based bioprinting, custom biomaterials, synthetic biology and AI-driven process control to enable high cell viability, multi-material printing and GMP-aligned manufacturing. Founded in 2016, the company focuses on advancing preclinical programs toward clinical studies.
company.name: Cellbricks Therapeutics

company.description: Subbyx provides subscription-based access to consumer electronics and household appliances via a product-as-a-service model, offering commitment-free monthly plans and device upgrades. The platform supports circular economy principles by refurbishing and reselling "PreLoved" devices alongside new products. Subbyx serves both consumers and B2B clients, including employee device programs and retail partners, and emphasizes sustainability and easy device access. Founded in July 2023 and headquartered in Lombardy, Italy.
company.name: Subbyx

company.description: PAVE Space is a Swiss space mobility startup spun out of the student-led Gruyère Space Program. The company develops orbital transportation solutions, including the LYOBA heavy-lift kick stage designed to move payloads of up to 5 tonnes between orbits and the smaller IBEX orbital platform. PAVE Space focuses on rapid satellite relocation and in-orbit logistics, with propulsion testing carried out in Valais and operations led by CEO Julie Böhning.
company.name: PAVE Space

company.description: Eunice is an AI infrastructure company building institutional-grade due diligence solutions for regulated markets. The platform replaces manual due diligence processes with AI-driven, audit-ready analysis for alternative assets and private markets, enabling institutions to defend their investment decisions with comprehensive documentation.
company.name: Eunice

company.description: Galtea is an AI evaluation platform that enables developers, QA engineers, product managers, and even domain experts to test their agents by generating hundreds of high-quality scenarios in under 2 minutes. So you know if your AI agent works before real users find out it doesn't.
company.name: Galtea

company.description: Epoch's biorecycling platform unlocks circularity for the toughest-to-recycle materials. Our AI-designed enzymes enable infinite recycling for mixed plastics and textiles at low temperatures. We produce sustainable outputs for use in apparel, automotive, packaging and more.
company.name: Epoch Biodesign

company.description: INCIRT (InCirT GmbH) is a DeepTech spinoff of RWTH Aachen University specializing in broadband data conversion technology for next-generation wireless communications including 5G-Advanced and 6G. The company has developed a novel chip system architecture based on intelligent parallelisation rather than optimising existing technology, and has successfully implemented and taped out the technology as a working silicon chip. INCIRT supports new radio and system architectures and aims to bolster Europe's semiconductor capabilities.
company.name: INCIRT

company.description: Origin is the world's first AI-powered Global Benefits Intelligence platform, purpose-built to bring clarity, control, and visibility to global benefits management. At the heart of Origin is Cuido™, their Artificial Benefits Intelligence™, which enables HR teams to cut costs, ensure compliance, and make smarter decisions across global benefits programs. The platform was co-created by leading global employers including Pfizer, BCG, bp, EA, Comcast, Organon and Iveco.
company.name: Origin Benefits

company.description: Skyroot Aerospace is India's pioneering private space launch company developing the Vikram series of launch vehicles for small and medium satellite payloads to low Earth orbit. Founded by former ISRO scientists Pawan Kumar Chandana and Naga Bharath Daka, the company has developed India's first privately-built cryogenic engine and 3D-printed cryogenic engine. Skyroot builds modular, low-cost rockets targeting commercial satellite launches and has partnered with global players including Exolaunch. Headquartered in Hyderabad, the company is EBITDA positive and targeting its first orbital launch.
company.name: Skyroot Aerospace

company.description: Founded in 2025 and headquartered in California and Singapore, Octen is an AI-native search infrastructure company dedicated to building the ultimate retrieval layer for the LLM era. Octen provides world-class search infrastructure services to developers and enterprises globally, powering the next generation of AI-driven applications and agentic workflows with industry-leading 62ms P50 latency and support for over 1 million QPS.
company.name: Octen

company.description: Amity is a Thailand-founded AI technology company developing vertical AI models tailored to specific industries such as retail and telecom. The company also builds agentic AI systems designed to automate business processes, and operates across Southeast Asia and Europe. Founded by Korawad Chearavanont in 2012, Amity's annualised revenue surpassed $100 million in 2025, growing more than tenfold since 2022, with over 75% of EBITDA from European operations. The company plans to establish an AI Research and Application Center in Singapore and targets a public listing in 2027.
company.name: Amity

company.description: Minimist is a Vienna-based AI startup building an AI-powered listing engine for second-hand retailers. Its platform transforms a single product photo into a complete, marketplace-ready listing in under 30 seconds, enabling retailers to publish to channels like eBay, Shopify, and Ricardo 10x faster than manual entry. Founded in 2024 by Stephan Hofmann (CEO), Robert Andrei Damian (CTO), and Anna Greil (COO), Minimist aims to make second-hand shopping indistinguishable from buying new by digitizing unique items at scale.
company.name: Minimist

company.description: Qualified Health is an enterprise AI platform for health systems that enables one integration, proven solutions, end-to-end governance, and real ROI. Trusted by 400,000+ users, the platform helps hospitals and health systems evaluate, implement, and govern AI applications across clinical and operational workflows.
company.name: Qualified Health

company.description: Autonomous drone delivery company providing last-mile logistics for medical supplies, food, retail, and other products using proprietary drones and software.
company.name: Zipline

company.description: Ozi - your one stop shop for everything kids - delivered fast and right.
company.name: OZi

company.description: WineBank operates a Tokyo-based platform for trading and managing fine wines, pairing a cloud-based portfolio and resale application with restaurant, membership, and e-commerce operations. The company launched the WineBank app in 2022 and added the WineBank Marketplace in 2025, aiming to modernize Japan's fine wine distribution by combining authenticated procurement with online trading and asset management. Its group runs 24 restaurant and wholesale outlets, the Aoyama Wine Market on Rakuten Ichiba, and the WineBank CLUB members' service.
company.name: WineBank

company.description: Novelty Wealth is a Bangalore-based SEBI-RIA licensed AI wealth management platform for Indian retail investors. The platform aggregates financial data across banks, brokerages, and investment accounts to provide a unified view of assets and liabilities, backed by NovaAI — a purpose-trained AI wealth advisor that delivers real-time, unbiased financial guidance. The company operates on a zero-commission, fee-only advisory model and offers portfolio analytics, tax optimization, family dashboard management, and goal-based financial planning. Founded by Naveen Changoiwala, Sajal Gupta, and Apurva Agarwal, Novelty Wealth targets the underserved affluent Indian investor segment currently served by commission-driven intermediaries.
company.name: Novelty Wealth

company.description: Eureka Labs is the fourth-largest Ethereum block builder, introducing 'programmable blocks' that shift blocks from passive transaction containers into active execution environments. Features include intra-block credit, state-aware pre-computation, and deterministic transaction placement. Founded December 2024 by Nir Magenheim, with 12 employees in Tel Aviv and Poland.
company.name: Eureka Labs

company.description: Saude Bliss is a Brazilian insurtech startup providing an AI-powered platform for distributing health insurance to small and medium-sized businesses. Its core product features an AI agent named Fatima that generates quotes, compares insurance products, and issues policies while automating operational tasks for brokers. The company reached breakeven by end of 2025.
company.name: Saude Bliss

company.description: Kidbea is a Noida-based omnichannel kidswear and childcare brand specializing in bamboo-based apparel and products for infants and toddlers. The company offers rompers, onesies, nightwear, newborn essentials and accessories with a focus on comfort and sustainable materials, and has been recognized as a Fast 42 brand of India.
company.name: Kidbea

company.description: Spade is a financial technology company founded in 2021 that provides a data and AI platform to enrich and structure fragmented transaction data in real time. Its platform transforms raw transaction records into verified merchant intelligence using a proprietary matching engine and AI agents, enabling banks, fintechs, and enterprises to power authorization decisions, rewards attribution, analytics, and customer experience. Spade serves customers including Bilt, Mercury, and Stripe and is built to scale for enterprise payments and AI use cases.
company.name: Spade Data, Inc.

company.description: Agrim Wholesale is an India-based B2B agricultural platform that connects farm input suppliers with retailers through a digitized procurement and logistics marketplace. The company offers a wide SKU range and technology tools aimed at retailers, including competitive pricing, delivery, and flexible payment options to serve small retailers and farmers. Founded in 2020 and headquartered in Gurugram, Agrim focuses on scaling distribution across India and improving supply-chain efficiency for agri-inputs.
company.name: Agrim Wholesale

company.description: Dronus is an Italian startup (founded 2018) that designs and manufactures automated industrial drone systems, specializing in the patented NEST® drone-in-a-box platform. Its technology enables autonomous inspection, monitoring and security patrols with 24/7 remote fleet management, automated take-off, landing and charging. Dronus serves industrial sites, critical infrastructure, smart cities and civil protection, focusing on scalable autonomous operations and AI-enabled analytics.
company.name: Dronus

company.description: Vensure Employer Solutions (branded VensureHR) provides HR technology and outsourced HR services including payroll, benefits administration, talent acquisition, risk and compliance, workers’ compensation and global payroll/EMR solutions. The company serves small to large businesses across industries such as healthcare, manufacturing, professional/business services and financial services, offering HCM technology, managed services and BPO. Founded in 2004 and headquartered in Chandler, Arizona, Vensure processes billions in payroll annually and supports hundreds of thousands of worksite employees globally.
company.name: Vensure Employer Solutions (VensureHR)

company.description: Verdence Capital Advisors is a private wealth advisory and multi-family office founded in 2017 and headquartered in Hunt Valley, Maryland. The firm provides integrated wealth management, financial planning, family office services, and access to private market opportunities for high-net-worth individuals, families, executives and business owners. Verdence operates an RIA+ platform that supports operations and access to alternative investments, and reported roughly $4.6 billion in assets under management as of December 31, 2025.
company.name: Verdence Capital Advisors

company.description: Worth AI is an agentic AI platform that combines verified identity data and AI agents to provide small business financial services. The company uses Know Your Agent frameworks and AI-driven automation for financial management.
company.name: Worth AI

company.description: Moda is an AI design platform that gives every professional a brand-aligned design agent capable of generating fully editable visual assets including presentations, marketing materials, and more. Founded by Anvisha Pai, Ravi Parikh, and John Holliman, Moda helps teams create brand-consistent designs at scale without design expertise.
company.name: Moda

company.description: Stellar Snacks is a better-for-you pretzel brand and manufacturer based in Carson City, Nevada. The company crafts pretzels from scratch using thoughtfully sourced ingredients, offering a range of flavors and innovative packaging featuring original artwork from emerging artists. Founded by Elisabeth Galvin (CEO) and Gina Galvin (CCO), Stellar Snacks products are available across club, grocery, mass, and natural stores nationwide.
company.name: Stellar Snacks

company.description: Pro Padel League (PPL) is North America's professional padel circuit, featuring 10 teams across the United States, Canada, and Mexico. The league provides a platform for both men's and women's competitions, with players from around the globe. PPL events reach 300 million households across more than 100 countries via world-class distribution partners, and all matches can also be viewed on the league's YouTube channel.
company.name: Pro Padel League

company.description: Nopalera creates Mexican botanical products for bath and body that celebrate and elevate Latino culture. Founded by Sandra Velasquez, the company offers cactus-based perfumes, body creams, and body polishes sold direct-to-consumer and in major retailers.
company.name: Nopalera, Inc.

company.description: Doss is an AI-native operations cloud platform that manages the flow of goods, dollars, and data across procurement, inventory, orders, and fulfillment for physical product businesses. Its Adaptive Resource Platform (ARP) plugs into existing ERP systems to add AI-powered inventory management and operations orchestration that legacy systems lack. Founded in 2022 by University of Illinois alumni Wiley Jones and Rishabh Mishra, Doss targets mid-market and enterprise companies in manufacturing, wholesale, and distribution. Headquartered in San Francisco.
company.name: Doss

company.description: Convene Hospitality Group is a multi-brand hospitality operator that designs, develops, and operates venues for meetings, events, conferences and flexible workspaces. Its portfolio includes brands such as Convene, etc.venues, NeueHouse and The Mallory, providing full-service meeting and event venues as well as select-service meeting spaces and flexible office offerings. CHG targets corporate clients, event organizers and enterprises seeking hospitality-driven environments, combining venue operations, production capabilities and technology to deliver experiential gatherings. The company is headquartered in New York City and positions itself at the intersection of hospitality, events and flexible workspaces.
company.name: Convene Hospitality Group

company.description: Silicon Quantum Computing (SQC) is a Sydney-based global leader in quantum computing, founded in 2017 at the University of New South Wales (UNSW) by Professor Michelle Simmons. SQC is the only company in the world capable of manufacturing quantum chips with atomic precision using its proprietary PAQMan™ process, while delivering quantum-enhanced AI products for enterprises and governments today. The company's products include Watermelon (a quantum machine learning system) and Quantum Twins (a quantum simulator for molecule and materials discovery), and it can design, produce, and test new quantum chips in under one week.
company.name: Silicon Quantum Computing

company.description: Halter is a global agtech company transforming cattle farming with GPS-enabled smart collars that use virtual fencing technology, allowing ranchers to manage herds from a smartphone using audio cues and gentle vibrations to contain cattle within virtual boundaries—without breaking ground or stringing wire. Founded by Craig Piggott, Halter serves more than 2,000 farmers and ranchers across New Zealand, Australia, and the United States, and has sold one million solar-powered GPS-enabled collars. The company has operations in Auckland (HQ), Melbourne, and Colorado.
company.name: Halter

company.description: Mirage (formerly Captions) is a video-generating, video-editing, and AI research company headquartered in New York City. Their platform builds foundation models and products for AI video creation, including Mirage Studio which generates AI actors and videos for marketing assets, and the Captions app for content creators.
company.name: Mirage (formerly Captions)

company.description: Immutrin is a biotechnology company developing next-generation antibody therapies designed to clear systemic amyloid deposits and reverse amyloidosis. Its lead asset targets ATTR cardiomyopathy, a severe and progressive form of amyloidosis, and represents a potential best-in-class treatment engineered to selectively and specifically remove established amyloid fibrils.
company.name: Immutrin

company.description: KidStrong is a franchisor and operator of science-based kids training programs designed for children walking through age 11, offering 45-minute classes, parties, camps and coach-led curriculum. Its programs focus on whole-child development—emotional, mental and physical skills—built by child development experts, educators, occupational therapists and sports performance specialists. Founded in 2015 and headquartered in Frisco, Texas, KidStrong has scaled via franchising since 2019 and operates dozens of centers across the US and Canada.
company.name: KidStrong

company.description: Overmatch Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm focused on deep tech, defense, and space companies. Founded by operators and veterans, the firm backs category-defining companies with access to government and defense networks and manages over $500M across its platform.
company.name: Overmatch Ventures

company.description: Conduit is an AI-powered dock and yard management system that replaces manual emails and spreadsheets with unified, automated workflows for warehouse shipping and receiving. Its modular platform includes dock scheduling, driver self-check-in, and yard management, serving hundreds of customers across North America including BODYARMOR and Flexport. The company reports a 172% net dollar retention rate and helps clients achieve a 20% increase in throughput and save team members two hours per day.
company.name: Conduit Dock & Yard

company.description: Gingco Systems GmbH is a German software company providing intelligent enterprise resource management and workspace booking solutions. The company operates Gingco Share, one of the leading workplace booking systems globally, enabling organizations to transparently manage desks, meeting rooms, and office resources with data-driven insights for strategic real estate decisions.
company.name: Gingco Systems

company.description: Kleiner Perkins is one of the world's most recognized venture capital firms with over five decades of investing in iconic companies including Google, Amazon, Figma, Glean, Harvey, Rippling, Waymo, and Anthropic. The firm invests in founders with bold ideas spanning consumer, enterprise, health care, financial services, and hardtech, partnering from inception to IPO and beyond across both early-stage and growth-stage investments.
company.name: Kleiner Perkins

company.description: Gilgamesh Pharma is a clinical-stage neuroscience biotechnology company developing novel new chemical entities aimed at transforming psychiatric disease treatment toward rapid-acting and durable therapies. The company focuses on next-generation neuroplastogens, NMDAR antagonists, safer ibogaine analogs, and M1/M4 agonists, using an AI-powered discovery platform that combines behavioral, electrophysiology, and molecular neuroplasticity measures. Founded in 2019 and headquartered in New York, it targets mental health conditions with orally bioavailable, non-hallucinogenic compounds designed to improve safety and efficacy over first-generation psychedelics.
company.name: Gilgamesh Pharma

company.description: EpiFrontier Therapeutics is a biotechnology company focused on developing epigenetic therapeutics for beta globin diseases, including sickle cell disease.
company.name: EpiFrontier Therapeutics, Inc.

company.description: RyboDyn is a biotechnology company developing first-in-class immunotherapies by unlocking the dark proteome using its proprietary RyboCypher™ platform. The company combines novel RNA sequencing with AI-driven models to discover previously unrecognized proteins and validate cancer-specific targets for antibody-based biologics, ADCs, and cell therapies. Founded in 2022 and headquartered in San Diego, RyboDyn focuses on highly specific cancer targets found only on tumor cells to improve safety and efficacy compared with conventional approaches.
company.name: RyboDyn, Inc.

company.description: Metric is a New York founded, high growth, global recruitment business partnering with some of the world's most cutting edge and innovative businesses to build world-class teams. Metric has three specialist brands: Metric Bio (MedTech and Life Science), Metric Geo (infrastructure and engineering talent), and Metric DCX (Data Center and Digital Infrastructure executive search).
company.name: Metric Search, Ltd.

company.description: BrainGrid is an AI Product Planner that helps non-technical builders and founders turn rough ideas into structured product plans that AI coding tools can execute reliably. The platform generates specs, breaks features into buildable tasks, and clarifies edge cases so coding agents (like Claude Code and Cursor) can produce production-ready software. BrainGrid follows a four-stage framework—Capture, Structure, Build, Verify—and targets AI-native SaaS makers, solo engineers, and venture studios.
company.name: BrainGrid (BrainGrid AI, Inc.)

company.description: Aptadel Therapeutics is a Barcelona-based pre-clinical biomedical company developing an RNA-based platform for targeted cancer therapy delivery. The company is focused on Ewing sarcoma, a rare and aggressive pediatric bone cancer, using aptamer-drug conjugates (APDCs) to deliver therapeutics precisely to tumor cells. Founded to advance precision oncology, Aptadel is based at the Barcelona Science Park and is preparing a Series A round of €9M to advance regulatory studies toward clinical phase.
company.name: Aptadel Therapeutics

company.description: Onit Security is an AI-agentic platform that automates the full exposure management lifecycle: from scanner ingestion and business-context prioritization to ownership resolution and autonomous remediation execution. Security teams define the strategy once and AI agents apply those decisions every time a similar exposure appears, eliminating ticket bounce-backs and vulnerability backlogs.
company.name: Onit Security

company.description: Virchow Medical (formerly Corramedical) manufactures the Crow's Nest® Biopsy Catchment System and operates the Virchow Vault™ Liquid Specimen Biorepository. The company captures tumor cells from used biopsy needles that would otherwise be discarded, creating Liquid Companion Specimens (LCSs) for genomic sequencing and precision oncology. Hospital subscribers receive monthly supplies of Crow's Nest units and store specimens in the Virchow Vault at a CAP-accredited facility, enabling oncologists to order genomic sequencing without accessing limited FFPE tissue from pathology.
company.name: Virchow Medical

company.description: NanoZymeX is a nanobiotechnology startup spun out of the University of Basel, developing next-generation enzyme replacement therapies using proprietary lipid-based nanoparticles. The company's platform improves the delivery of therapeutic enzymes directly into target cells and lysosomes, increasing functional activity in affected tissues while reducing immune reactions. NanoZymeX targets lysosomal storage disorders including Pompe disease, representing a multibillion-dollar therapeutic market.
company.name: NanoZymeX

company.description: BKR Capital (formerly Black Innovation Capital) is a venture capital fund built with the objective of investing in promising Black-led technology companies. Founded in 2021 and based in Toronto, Canada, the firm makes early and transformational investments in high-growth technology companies focused on the future of work, living, and global connectivity.
company.name: BKR Capital

company.description: Euler Motors is an India-based manufacturer of commercial electric vehicles (EVs), specializing in high-payload electric three-wheelers and light commercial vehicles for urban logistics, last-mile delivery, and fleet operations. The company targets e-commerce, logistics operators, and enterprises seeking electric alternatives for cargo delivery in Indian cities. Euler Motors designs and manufactures its own EV platforms and has expanded its product portfolio across commercial vehicle categories.
company.name: Euler Motors

company.description: Cauldron Ferm is a next-generation biomanufacturing company pioneering continuous 'hyper-fermentation' technology for industrial-scale, cost-competitive bioproduction. Based in Orange, New South Wales, Australia, the company keeps engineered microbes in a highly productive steady state running continuously at up to 10,000-liter scale—delivering higher yields, lower costs, and reduced resource inputs compared to traditional batch fermentation. Cauldron serves clients commercializing bio-based food ingredients, chemicals, and nutraceuticals, and operates a 30,000-liter demonstration facility. Founded in 2022, the company was named a World Economic Forum Technology Pioneer in 2025 and recognized on Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies list in 2026.
company.name: Cauldron Ferm

company.description: Cambridge Mobile Telematics (CMT) is the world's largest telematics and AI company for safer mobility. Its DriveWell Fusion platform uses AI to proactively identify and reduce driving risk, leading to fewer crashes and injuries. CMT partners with insurers, automakers, commercial mobility companies, and the public sector to measure risk, detect crashes, provide life-saving assistance, and streamline claims. The company has helped prevent over 100,000 crashes, protected 55 million drivers in 25 countries, and operates 140 programs worldwide.
company.name: Cambridge Mobile Telematics
